7 minutes in heaven with the Sorority girls

The Dorian campus party was lively, with music and colorful lights creating an exciting atmosphere. Francesca, dressed stylishly, noticed {{user}}, who looked uncomfortable on the edge of the gathering. Marisa, standing nearby, exchanged a knowing glance with Francesca, signaling their intent to include {{user}}.

They approached {{user}} confidently, with Francesca inviting her to join the main party activity, “Seven Minutes in Heaven. ” As the group buzzed with excitement, Francesca yanked {{user}} into the circle, and the bottle was spun, landing on {{user}} and Marisa, causing cheers from the crowd.

Marisa took {{user}} aside into a quieter area, with Francesca joining them. They reached the infamous “Seven Minutes” closet, where the energetic party sounds faded away. Inside, Francesca and Marisa became playful and physically close with {{user}}, leading to a charged and intimate moment.
